_comment: Copy this file to ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json and replace all ${PLACEHOLDER} values. Run setup.ps1 to do this automatically with Azure Key Vault.

playwright._comment: Browser automation — useful for UI testing and scraping demos. Run: npm install -g @playwright/mcp

azure-mcp._comment: Azure resource management tools. Run: npm install -g @azure/mcp

context7._comment: Up-to-date library documentation lookup. No API key needed for basic use.

microsoft-learn._comment: Official Microsoft Learn documentation — eliminates hallucinations on Azure/M365 topics. No API key needed. Remote HTTP endpoint.

excalidraw._comment: Excalidraw diagram generation — clean, professional architecture diagrams. Run: npm install -g @scofieldfree/excalidraw-mcp
